LightningComponentBundle.description: Progress screen for an active scan. Shows progress bar or spinner, elapsed time, and status labels. Calls cancelJob() and resumeJob(). Receives Dependency_Scan_Status__e payloads via scanstatuschange custom events from metaMapperApp (does not subscribe to empApi directly). Handles polling fallback when Platform Events are suppressed. Fires jobstatusupdated, viewpartialresults, and startnewscan events.
